name: Wild Rice Bread 3
recipeIngredient: 1 2/3 cups wild rice, cooked and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. In the bread machine pan, add all ingredients in the order suggested by the manufacturer's instructions.
2. Select the basic bread setting on the machine.
3. Choose your preferred crust color and loaf size.
4. Bake according to the bread machine's directions.
